findings.title: CP00-027 evidence pack artifacts not yet present (expected closeout step)
findings.details: The contract (current_subphase + subphase_closeouts + definition + production_ready_requires flag), fixture, policies.js, service.js, validators.js, service.test.js, and README for RP00.P02.M06.S11 are complete and mutually consistent, and validate-rp00-control-plane-contract.mjs now requires docs/closeout-packs/cp00-027/{manifest.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json}. These files do not exist yet, so `npm run rp00:control-plane:validate` fails pre-evidence exactly as stated in the caller context. The newly added inspection gate (closeout.id === RP00.P02.M06.S11) additionally requires construction-inspection.json to set control_plane_synthetic_fixture_set_lock_acquisition_rule_verified === true.
findings.recommendation: Generate the cp00-027 evidence pack — including this review as claude-review-result.json and a construction-inspection.json with control_plane_synthetic_fixture_set_lock_acquisition_rule_verified: true — then re-run the validator to confirm green. This is the normal closeout flow, not a code defect.
findings.adjudication_detail: The CP00-027 evidence pack is generated with manifest, command evidence, Claude review, adjudication, and construction inspection containing the required production-ready flag.

findings.title: Untracked working-tree entries outside CP00-027 scope
findings.details: Git status lists untracked `.DS_Store` and `Law Firm OS UI/`, neither of which is part of the CP00-027 diff. The pack touches exactly the 8 declared target_files; these untracked entries are unrelated to the lock-acquisition-rule unit and could be inadvertently bundled into the pack commit.
findings.recommendation: Keep both out of the CP00-027 commit; add `.DS_Store` to .gitignore and confirm `Law Firm OS UI/` is intentional in-progress work tracked separately. Out-of-scope housekeeping, non-blocking.
findings.adjudication_detail: The untracked .DS_Store and Law Firm OS UI/ entries are explicitly outside CP00-027 scope, remain unstaged, and are listed in manifest.worktree_transition_policy. They do not block this pack commit.

security_notes: Claude found the S11 metadata-only no-write and no-runtime-lock guarantee holds.
Claude found no P0/P1/P2 issues and no production_ready blocker after evidence generation.
test_notes: CP00-027 records one valid pack-level Claude Opus 4.8 max read-only review.
raw_review.summary: Claude reported two nonblocking P3 findings. The missing evidence pack is resolved by generating CP00-027 evidence before final validation; untracked .DS_Store and Law Firm OS UI/ are excluded from the pack commit. Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 after adjudication is 0.

Every capability flag is false: lock_acquisition_permitted, lock_record_write_permitted, lock_store_write_permitted, ui_created, fixture_generation/persistence_permitted, idempotency_record/store_write_permitted, runtime_permission/authz/permission_engine/security_trimming, audit_ledger_append/audit_event_write, database/storage/product_state. The 72-field result list is identical across policies.js, contract definition, and fixture; the 20-field lock_receipt matches requiredLockReceiptFields; validator pins forbiddenLockClaims=41 and failClosedOn=24 with anti-drift length checks; validate script adds definition/policy/prechecker/fixture parity, live allow + 16 fail-closed reject checks, README/test text gates, and a construction-inspection gate. No product state, runtime lock acquisition, UI, fixture generation/persistence, idempotency/lock store/record, audit append, or runtime permission/AuthZ/trimming is performed; no real data/secrets; no source-microphase-completion claim. adjudication_notes: Claude raw P3 findings were adjudicated without running a second valid review: evidence-pack absence is resolved by CP00-027 evidence generation plus final validation, and untracked out-of-scope worktree entries remain unstaged. Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 after adjudication is 0.
